programme.desc: 24 Grand Prix from the Formula 1 Season are live and exclusive only on beIN. All Practices, Qualifiers and Races are available live with a choice of Arabic or English commentary. The 2026 season will consist of 6 Sprint Races within the 24 weekends.

programme.title: EN UCL Magazine 2025/26 | E36

programme.desc: Highlights from the latest Premier League Matchweek. Review incorporates all the key moments and manager reaction from every fixture, making it a must-see programme for all Premier League fans.

programme.title: Crystal Palace vs Arsenal - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 38
programme.desc: All 380 matches from the English Premier league are live and exclusive only on beIN. All matches are available live with a choice of Arabic or English commentary. The season will consist of 33 weekends and five midweek rounds of matches. Liverpool are the defending champions, having won their second Premier League title.

programme.title: Freiburg vs Aston Villa - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Final
programme.desc: The 2025–26 UEFA Europa League is the secondary club football tournament organised by UEFA. This is the second season played under a new format, which replaced the 32-team group stage with a 36-team league phase. Tottenham Hotspur are the reigning champions. The final will be played on 20 May 2026 at Beşiktaş Stadium in Istanbul, Turkey.

programme.title: Crystal Palace vs Rayo Vallecano - UEFA Conference League 2025/2026 - Final
programme.desc: The UEFA Conference League is the third-tier club football tournament organised by UEFA. The new format competition runs for its second season live and exclusive only on beIN. The RB Arena in Leipzig, Germany, is the venue for the Conference League final on 27 May 2026.

programme.title: Paris FC vs Lorient - Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 7

Stadium of Fears
programme.desc: Everyone knows the biggest stadiums in the world. But sometimes it's the smallest stadiums that are the most intimidating for players, due to their fans and their fervor. Several big names in football tell you about their experiences in these stadiums where it can sometimes be difficult to play.

More than a Match - Derby of Algiers
programme.desc: Algiers is hosting one of the most passionate football derbies. The passion that this match gives off throughout the city is incredible. The history, the culture, the anecdotes are told through this documentary, the derby of Algiers is more than a game.

Alejandro Davidovich Fokina (ESP) vs Mattia Bellucci (ITA) - ATP 250 Boss Open 2026
programme.desc: ATP 250 Boss Open 2026 takes place in Stuttgart, Germany, at Tennis Club Weissenhof. The tournament switched from clay to grass in 2015 and has since become one of the key Wimbledon warm-up events. Played on fast outdoor grass courts, it regularly attracts top-ranked players and big-serving grass-court specialists.

The tournament switched from clay to grass in 2015 and has since become one of the key Wimbledon warm-up events. Played on fast outdoor grass courts, it regularly attracts top-ranked players and big-serving grass-court specialists.

programme.title: Argentina vs Croatia - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Semi Finals 1
programme.desc: This is the third World Cup meeting between Argentina and Croatia, and first in the knockout stages. Argentina won 1-0 in 1998, before Croatia's 3-0 win in the 2018 edition in Russia. Argentina are looking to reach the World Cup final for the sixth time, a figure bettered only by Germany. They've never been eliminated at the semi-final stage before

programme.title: Argentina vs Croatia - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Semi Finals 1
programme.desc: This is the third World Cup meeting between Argentina and Croatia, and first in the knockout stages. Argentina won 1-0 in 1998, before Croatia's 3-0 win in the 2018 edition in Russia. Argentina are looking to reach the World Cup final for the sixth time, a figure bettered only by Germany. They've never been eliminated at the semi-final stage before

programme.title: France vs Morocco - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Semi Finals 2
programme.desc: France have never lost against Morocco, with all five of their previous meetings coming in friendlies. The most recent encounter was a 2-2 draw in Saint-Denis in November 2007. France have alternated between victory and defeat in their six World Cup meetings with African nations, losing 1-0 against Tunisia last time out in this year's group stage.

programme.title: Argentina vs France - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Final
programme.desc: Argentina are competing in their sixth World Cup final, with only Germany participating in more. They're looking to win the trophy for a third time along with 1978 and 1986, but defeat would see them with the joint-most World Cup final losses in history. France have reached the World Cup final for a fourth time, all since 1998. This is twice as ma

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Preview - Ep 1
programme.desc: The 2026 FIFA World Cup, held across Canada, Mexico, and the USA from June 11 to July 19, 2026, will be the largest ever with 48 teams and 104 matches, significantly expanding the competition format. This series provides key previews, team analysis and player profiles of the greatest show on earth.
